reason: Changing the GRUB2 superuser username requires editing /etc/grub.d/01_users and regenerating grub.cfg. A misconfiguration can render the system unbootable or lock out administrative access at boot time, making it a high-risk change that should be handled with extreme caution.
estimated_impact: reboot required; authentication/authorization affected; Bootloader misconfiguration; Loss of boot access; Potential system lockout
